subcodes.title: Words spoken in Sep. 1911 in London
subcodes.first_line: The bounty and power of God is limitless for each human soul. Consider what was the quickening power
subcodes.subjects: @Mary Magdalene, @fulfillment of true potential, @Saint Peter and Saint Paul, @power of the Manifestation of God, @apostles; early disciples of Christ, @spiritual transformation, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
